message:
feat(freeze): add iterator protocol and partial freeze support

Phase 2.7: Iterator Protocol
- Add for_of_start, for_of_next, iterator_close, iterator_get_value_done
  opcodes to zig_codegen_full.zig
- Add iterator FFI declarations (js_frozen_for_of_start, js_frozen_for_of_next)
  and helper functions to zig_runtime.zig
- Add newCatchOffset helper for iterator cleanup

Phase 2.8: Partial Freeze
- Add blockFallback FFI wrapper to zig_runtime.zig for contaminated blocks
- Modify emitBlock to emit fallback calls for contaminated blocks
- Pass partial_freeze and js_name to ZigCodeGen from frozen_registry.zig

Functions with mixed clean/contaminated blocks now get partial native
coverage instead of being skipped entirely (e.g., safeDivide 3/9 blocks,
findFirst 4/5 blocks).
